L0_SPECIFICITY.notes: Well-defined observability monorepo, 15 crates, OTel specs, FRAMES.md, manifesto

L1_FIT.notes: Adopted by phenotype-org, integrated with pheno-mcp-router, adapters, tracing

L2_IMPLEMENTATION.notes: Rust idiomatic, compiles on main, but 55 branches == partial churn on compile gate

L3_OBSERVABILITY.notes: Self-observing — OTel-native, metrics, traces, logs via crate hierarchy

L4_MULTITENANCY.notes: Crate isolation present but no explicit multi-tenant test harness

L5_RESILIENCE.notes: Sentinel/lock deps, but no formal backpressure or circuit-breaker in observability path

L6_SECURITY.notes: SBOM via cargo-deny, SLSA via release attestation, Dependabot active

L7_CONFORMANCE.notes: CI quality gates exist but no policy-as-code outside of deny.toml

L8_PERFORMANCE.notes: No explicit benchmarks in CI — would benefit from criterion benches

L9_INTEGRATION.notes: Contract-tested via pheno-mcp-router integration; integration test suite exists

L10_PACKAGING.notes: Docker images via CI but no Helm chart — packaged as library primarily

L11_DOCUMENTATION.notes: FRAMES.md, manifesto, speck docs, OTel data contracts, ADRs in docs/

L13_CI_CD.notes: Full CI with quality gates, release, dependabot, sonar advisory, free runners

L14_QUALITY.notes: clippy, cargo-deny, rustfmt, pre-commit, quality-gate workflow

L18_PORTABILITY.notes: Rust cross-compiles but Windows support untested; Linux-primary

L19_EXTENSIBILITY.notes: Crate hierarchy allows new observability types as crates

L20_MAINTAINABILITY.notes: CODEOWNERS, release-drafter, clear ownership via crate structure

L21_TESTABILITY.notes: Unit tests present but snapshot tests only partially adopted

L22_REPRODUCIBILITY.notes: Cargo.lock committed, Ubuntu pin in CI, deterministic builds

L23_COMPATIBILITY.notes: API in flux across 55 branches; OTel specs help stabilize

L24_ACCESSIBILITY.notes: Rust crate DX good but Python SDK docs need expansion

L26_SCALABILITY.notes: Crate hierarchy scales but no horizontal scaling test

L27_COST.notes: No explicit cost analysis — would benefit from resource tracking

L28_SUSTAINABILITY.notes: Active maintenance, Dependabot, release cadence established

L29_COMPLETENESS.notes: Shipped and in use but 6 CVE/pr178 forks suggest incomplete merge discipline

top_gaps: L4_MULTITENANCY: score 1/2 — add multi-tenant isolation test harness
L5_RESILIENCE: score 1/2 — backpressure/circuit-breaker for observability pipeline
L8_PERFORMANCE: score 1/2 — add criterion benchmarks to CI
L10_PACKAGING: score 1/2 — add Helm chart for observability stack
L21_TESTABILITY: score 1/2 — adopt snapshot tests across all crates
L23_COMPATIBILITY: score 1/2 — API stabilization across 55 branches
L24_ACCESSIBILITY: score 1/2 — expand Python SDK docs
L26_SCALABILITY: score 1/2 — add horizontal scaling tests
L29_COMPLETENESS: score 1/2 — merge discipline for feature branches

immediate_actions: Merge all in-sync feature branches to main
Add criterion bench to CI pipeline
Enforce snapshot tests on all new crates
